title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at Nucleus Software

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at Nucleus Software
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Nucleus Software. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Software Engineer to strengthen our Surat-based team.

About Nucleus Software:
Nucleus Software is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Java

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nucleus Software!
